%

% from source `travail_de_vacances' on 2023/07/04 on line 325
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    \begin{tasks}(2)
        \task*
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                \uwave{8ab}+\uline{2a}-\uwave{6ab}-\uline{a}+\uwave{3ab}-\uwave{ab}%4ab+a$
                 & = 4ab + a
            \end{aligned}$
        \task*
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (2a-6)(b-2) & = 2ab - 4a - 6b + 12
            \end{aligned}$
        \task*
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (a-2b)^2 & = a^2 - 2 \cdot a \cdot 2b + (2b)^2 \\
                         & = a^2 - 4ab + 4b^2
            \end{aligned}$
        \task*
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (3a-2)(3a+2) & = (3a)^2 - 2^2 \\
                             & = 9a^2 - 4
            \end{aligned}$
        \task*
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                -6ab(10a+b^2) & = -60a^2b - 6ab^3
            \end{aligned}$
        \task*
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                -7(10a+2)-5(5-4a)
                 & = \uline{-70a} - \uwave{14} - \uwave{25} + \uline{20a} \\
                 & = -50a - 39
            \end{aligned}$
        \task*
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                2(a+2) - (3a-6)
                 & = \uline{2a} + \uwave{4} - \uline{3a} + \uwave{6} \\
                 & = -a + 10
            \end{aligned}$
        \task*
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (a-2)^2+(3a-5)(a+2)
                 & = a^2 - 2\cdot a \cdot 2 + 2^2 + 3a^2 + 6a - 5a - 10   \\
                 & = \uuline{a^2} -\uwave{4a} + \uline{4} + \uuline{3a^2}
                + \uwave{6a} - \uwave{5a} - \uline{10}                    \\
                 & = 4a^2 - 3a - 6
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                7\left(\dfrac{3a}{2}-\dfrac{3}{8}\right)
                 & = 7\left(\dfrac{12a}{8}-\dfrac{3}{8}\right) \\
                 & = 7\cdot\dfrac{12a-3}{8}                    \\
                 & = \dfrac{7(12a-3)}{8}                       \\
                 & = \dfrac{84a - 21}{8}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                5+\dfrac{7-4 a}{10}
                 & = \dfrac{50}{10} + \dfrac{7-4 a}{10} \\
                 & = \dfrac{50+(7-4a)}{10}              \\
                 & = \dfrac{57-4a}{10}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                -7+\dfrac{10+a}{2}
                 & = \dfrac{-14}{2} + \dfrac{10+a}{2} \\
                 & = \dfrac{-14+(10+a)}{2}            \\
                 & = \dfrac{-4+a}{2}
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                -5(a-3)(a+3)
                 & = -5(a^2 - 3^2) \\
                 & = -5(a^2 - 9)   \\
                 & = -5a^2 + 45
            \end{aligned}$
    \end{tasks}
